per_outcome.operationalization: Count of distinct textual information sources cited in analyst reports
Count of distinct figure sources cited in analyst reports
Count of distinct table sources cited in analyst reports
Count of firm-specific topics (e.g., earnings guidance, product launches) discussed in reports
Count of industry-level topics (e.g., supply chain, regulatory developments) discussed in reports
Count of macroeconomic topics (e.g., monetary policy, inflation) discussed in reports
Count of historical trend analyses evaluating firm's past performance and patterns
Count of valuation models used (e.g., DCF, comparable company multiples)
Count of forecasting methods used (e.g., earnings projections, scenario analysis)
Log of leader ratio: cumulative days between focal forecast and two prior forecasts divided by days to two subsequent forecasts
Negative absolute difference between analyst's EPS forecast and subsequently realized EPS
Difference between sources predicting earnings increase vs. decrease, scaled by their sum
One minus absolute value of SignalSource; measures balanced presentation of firm fundamentals
Market-adjusted return over [0,2] trading day window following analyst report release
Market-adjusted shares traded [0,2] days post-release minus [-40,-11] baseline, scaled by shares outstanding
